commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Added PartDecoupler part component class. Doesn't function yet, but stay tuned - it soon will.
Added PartDecoupler component to existing interstage fairing parts.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Changed Decoupler part component, it does not need to be stateful.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Created a PartTree.Merge to accompany PartTree.Split and made the two methods roughly symmetric in how they operate.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Changed vehicle editor snapping to use screen space instead of assembly space.
Moved the point of nonzero mass property checks into the physics system instead of the part system to suppress spurious errors.

commits.author: Morrow
lines: Changed running Id to be a uint rather than ulong to align with project standards.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Added StageList to PartList. This is used to manage stage assignment of parts in a part list.
Added temporary UI to Vehicle editor for Stage management, with some rudimentary capabilities.

commits.author: Morrow
lines: Added a fallback when raycasting towards a newly spawned part in the editor fails.

commits.author: Morrow
lines: Fixed spawning a new part not properly resetting 'selected' values of child parts.

commits.author: Rocket
lines: Added new part context menu and window. When right clicked, a part will show a condensed context menu including actions such as Decouple, and fuel tank status. A "Window" open will pull the context menu out into a moveable pinned window with further information, and will remain until closed.
